channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Tennessee redistricting plan splits Memphis neighbors and reshapes midterms as other states follow
item.description: A new congressional map in Tennessee splits the majority-Black city of Memphis into three districts.

item.title: Pedestrian dies after being hit by Frontier Airlines plane that was taking off at Denver airport
UCLA online textbook gives voice to Asian American, Pacific Islander history and cultures
